name: Chunky Butter Christmas Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Old fashioned or quick oats, uncooked
1 can Macadamia nuts, coarsely chopped (3 1/2 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and brown sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Blend in sour cream, egg, and vanilla.
3. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Add to butter mixture; mix well.
4. Stir in oats, vanilla milk chips, coconut, and nuts.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough, 2 inches apart, onto ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes or until edges are lightly browned.
7. Cool on cookie sheet for 1 minute. Remove to cooling rack; cool completely.
8. Makes 5 dozen cookies.
